characters.appearance: Young adult male, slim build, short dark hair. Seen exclusively from behind. Distinguishing mark: 'ME NO ENGLISH' written in large red letters across his upper back.
White humanoid robot face with bright blue eyes. Smooth synthetic skin with visible mechanical joints in the neck area.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Hello, what is your name? [Hello, what is your name?]
Character A says: My name is Rahul. [My name is Rahul.]
Character B says: How old are you? [How old are you?]
Character A says: I have 22. [I have 22.]
Character B says: I have 22 नहीं, I am 22 years old होता है। [Not 'I have 22', it should be 'I am 22 years old'.]
Character A says: Okay okay. I am 22 years old. [Okay okay. I am 22 years old.]
Character B says: Where are you from? [Where are you from?]
Character A says: I am Uttar Pradesh. [I am Uttar Pradesh.]
Character B says: I am Uttar Pradesh नहीं, I am from Uttar Pradesh होगा। [Not 'I am Uttar Pradesh', it will be 'I am from Uttar Pradesh'.]
Character A says: Oh, ठीक है, ठीक है। मुझे English अच्छे से नहीं आती। [Oh, okay, okay. I don't know English well.]
Character B says: कोई problem नहीं। Supernova का AI tutor try किया? [No problem. Have you tried Supernova's AI tutor?]
Character A says: वो तो महंगे होते होंगे ना? [They must be expensive, right?]
Character B says: बिल्कुल नहीं, बहुत affordable है। लाखों लोग Supernova पर रोज़ English बोलने की practice कर रहे हैं। [Not at all, it's very affordable. Lakhs of people are practicing speaking English daily on Supernova.]
Character A says: पर time नहीं मिलता। [But I don't get time.]
Character B says: रोज़ की सिर्फ 15-20 minute की practice काफी है। बिल्कुल confident हो जाओगे। [Just 15-20 minutes of daily practice is enough. You will become completely confident.]
Character A says: Wow, कैसे join करूँ? [Wow, how do I join?]
Character B says: ये install का button दबाओ और Supernova app install करो। रोज़ बोलोगे तो fluency अपने आप आ जाएगी। चलो, शुरू करें। [Press this install button and install the Supernova app. If you speak daily, fluency will come naturally. Come on, let's start.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the learner with a relatable, real-world grammar correction scenario.
- Introduces Supernova's AI tutor as an affordable, time-efficient solution to overcome hesitation.
- Replaces aggressive competitor hype (7x cheaper, 15-day guarantee) with a realistic, encouraging promise of building fluency through daily practice.

scenes.supernova_script: Unknown speaker says: Install now पे click करो और Supernova app download करो। [Click on install now and download the Supernova app.]

- Delivers a clear, direct call-to-action.
- Prompts the user to download the Supernova app to start their learning journey.
